title: CarpeDiem
desc: Visualize your life in weeks and make every moment count!

title: CertificateGenerator
desc: Generate, verify, and share certificates, made with Next.js and MongoDB.

title: AutoNext
desc: A VS Code extension to automate `npm run dev` and browser launch for Next.js projects

title: LockedIn
desc: A productivity app that helps you manage tasks efficiently with time tracking, prioritization with daily motivational quotes and background syncing to cloud.

title: Accounts
desc: Frontend of Backend project (which was built using FastAPI) using Next.js

title: Backend
desc: Backend API most of my projects use, built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL.

title: Customer Segmentation & Churn Prediction System
desc: Production-grade customer churn prediction and segmentation platform built with XGBoost, SHAP, MLflow, FastAPI, and Docker.

title: RAG-Based Patient Review Question-Answering Chatbot
desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system to answer questions from patient reviews. This repository contains a Jupyter notebook that demonstrates how to build a RAG-based chatbot for answering questions based on patient reviews.

title: Real-Time Sign Language Translation System
desc: Translates sign language gestures captured via flex sensors into speech in real time — achieving 25ms inference latency and 120ms end-to-end response.

title: MBRL World Models Planning
desc: Production-grade Model-Based Reinforcement Learning system with learned world models (VAE + RSSM) and planning (MCTS, CEM) for sample-efficient decision making in continuous control environments.
